query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS datajud_auto_check_config (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  isActive TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  intervaloMinutos INT DEFAULT 60 NOT NULL,
  ultimaVerificacao TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalVerificacoes INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalAlertas INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  criadoPor VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX djac_company (companyId)
)
